mapper.sql: id, plan_creator, plan_creation_time, review_start_time, review_end_time, review_purpose, review_host, review_location, review_report_status, del_flag, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
insert into manage_review_plan
id,
plan_creator,
plan_creation_time,
review_start_time,
review_end_time,
review_purpose,
review_host,
review_location,
review_report_status,
del_flag,
create_time,
update_time,
participant,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{planCreator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{planCreationTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{reviewStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{reviewEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{reviewPurpose,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reviewHost,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reviewLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reviewReportStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{participant,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update manage_review_plan
plan_creator = #{planCreator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
plan_creation_time = #{planCreationTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
review_start_time = #{reviewStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
review_end_time = #{reviewEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
review_purpose = #{reviewPurpose,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
review_host = #{reviewHost,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
review_location = #{reviewLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
review_report_status = #{reviewReportStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
participant = #{participant,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update manage_review_plan set plan_creator = #{planCreator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, plan_creation_time = #{planCreationTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, review_start_time = #{reviewStartTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, review_end_time = #{reviewEndTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, review_purpose = #{reviewPurpose,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, review_host = #{reviewHost,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, review_location = #{reviewLocation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, review_report_status = #{reviewReportStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, del_flag = #{delFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
